_policy: Every consciously deferred piece of work gets a row: what was deferred, why, what enforcement exists meanwhile, and a review-by date. `cargo xtask deferrals --check` (weekly scheduled CI) fails once a row passes its date un-re-decided — a deferral nobody re-examines is a silent forever. Re-deciding means either building the thing (delete the row) or re-dating it with a fresh reason in the same commit. Decisions intended to be permanent do not belong here; they get ADRs.

deferrals.what: The pinned suite's fourteen auth/* client scenarios (OAuth metadata discovery, registration, PKCE flows) as host-SUT gates
deferrals.why: Requires a full OAuth client; ADR-0009 §5 scoped it out of M3 exactly as the registry's TRAN-009 exclusion records for the server side
deferrals.meanwhile: TRAN-009 documented exclusion; the four protocol scenarios gate in CI

deferrals.what: File the measured rmcp 1.7 SSE-resumption gap (register row 3.12, ADR-0009 §Amendment) as a rust-sdk issue with the probe artifacts
deferrals.why: Outward-facing engagement is sequenced behind the M3 merge so the dossier can link the compliant implementation
deferrals.meanwhile: Register row 3.12 carries the full repro; a ready-to-file dossier is prepared (docs/reports/rmcp-sse-resumption-dossier.md, source re-confirmed 2026-06-13 at head 266f870); probe checks.json retained

deferrals.what: Re-check rust-sdk#902 (everything-server offer): respond, re-ping, or record the outcome when the R9 60-day clock runs out
deferrals.why: The offer was posted 2026-06-11; the risk register's R9 gives upstream 60 days before the offer is re-evaluated
deferrals.meanwhile: Risk R9 row; issue #9 tracks the conversation

deferrals.what: Re-verify every register row dated 2026-06-09..12 in docs/plan/01-ecosystem-context.md before external use
deferrals.why: The register's own maintenance rule 1: rows older than 90 days must be re-verified before citation
deferrals.meanwhile: Rows carry verification dates; CI does not consume row facts

deferrals.what: Bump the suite pin when the 0.2.0 line stabilizes (alpha.3 published 2026-06-12; register rows 2.4/2.16), refresh both expected-failures baselines and the agreement divergence ledger in the same change
deferrals.why: Pin bumps are deliberate PRs with a scenario diff review (03-conformance-strategy §Official-suite version policy)
deferrals.meanwhile: Weekly suite-alpha job runs the alpha dist-tag non-blocking; conformance#338's fix arrives with the bump and its baseline entry will go stale loudly
